_note: Farengar Secret-Fire — male-native blue robe, fully reproducible (no hand art). The female-only Robe asset never aligned on a male body, so we fake a robe from male pieces: Longsleeve laced (torso) + Plain skirt (lower body) = robe silhouette. (Robe Belt was tried as a waist sash but dropped — it has no idle and looks fine without.) Color = blue to match the Celestial Wizard Hat and Farengar's canonical blue robes (UESP). Longsleeve laced has no idle anim, so AFTER composing, rebuild mage_idle.png from the walk sheet's standing frame (column 0 of each direction row) with PIL. Re-run: python tools/lpc_compose.py --params @tools/mage.json --out new-game-project/assets/chars --name mage  then the idle-rebuild one-liner.
